Minor'S Compromise In Scd. Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carlito Mandia.
Roger Sisneros, Esq. for Petitioner: Jose Rodriguez, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Oscar Rodriguez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Medical Expenses $975.00
A net balance of $2,025.00 to be depositted into a blocked account with Washington Mutual, 2166 Chesnut St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
